name: AU Small Finance Bank LIT Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Renewal fee of ₹499 waived on annual spend of ₹2,00,000; joining fee is always free

categoryRates.description: 1 Reward Point per ₹100 spent on non-chosen categories
5X Reward Points on your first chosen category (e.g., Grocery, Dining, Online Shopping, etc.)
5X Reward Points on your second chosen category
5X Reward Points on your third chosen category

cappedCategories.description: 5X rewards on chosen categories capped at 5,000 bonus RP per month

welcomeBenefits.description: Zero joining fee - no welcome benefit

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Renewal fee waiver + 2,000 bonus Reward Points

additionalBenefits: Choose any 3 reward categories from 7+ options (Grocery, Dining, Online Shopping, Travel, Entertainment, Utilities, Healthcare)
Change chosen categories once per quarter via AU 0101 app
Lifetime free option available (first year always free)
Instant card issuance via AU 0101 app
pros: Zero joining fee and first year free
Unique choose-your-category feature for personalized rewards
5X rewards on 3 categories of your choice
Can change categories quarterly for flexibility
Decent domestic lounge access for an entry card
cons: Low base reward rate on non-chosen categories
5X rewards are capped at 5,000 bonus RP per month
AU Bank has limited branch network compared to large banks
Renewal fee of ₹499 applies from second year (waivable)
idealFor: First-time credit card users looking for a no-cost entry
Users who want to customize their reward categories
Budget-conscious users who spend in specific categories

faqs.question: How does the choose-your-category feature work?
faqs.answer: When you get the card, you pick 3 categories from options like Grocery, Dining, Online Shopping, Travel, Entertainment, Utilities, and Healthcare. You earn 5X reward points on spends in your chosen categories. You can change your selections once per quarter via the AU 0101 app.

faqs.question: Is the AU LIT card really lifetime free?
faqs.answer: The first year is always free (₹0 joining fee). From the second year, a ₹499 renewal fee applies, which is waived if you spend ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous year.

faqs.question: What categories can I choose from?
faqs.answer: Available categories typically include Grocery, Dining, Online Shopping, Travel, Entertainment, Utilities, and Healthcare. AU Bank may add or modify categories over time.

faqs.question: Can I get this card without an AU Bank account?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can apply for the AU LIT card without having an existing AU Bank account. However, having a savings account with AU Bank may improve your chances of approval and credit limit.
